title: Yoda API Result
description: Standard response envelope returned by every Yoda Core and Datarequest API operation. The Yoda HTTP API (https://utrechtuniversity.github.io/yoda-ruleset/) wraps all responses in this object.

status.description: Status identifier. 'ok' on success, or an error ID on failure.

data.description: Operation-specific payload. May be an object, array, scalar, or null.
